targets.rawSql: SELECT Environment,SupportGroup , count(CIName) SrvCnt From  AdminSQLCentral.Inventory.ServerList group by Environment , SupportGroup

SELECT 
CASE A.ServerName
WHEN 'PLER0104\PXRP' THEN 'EOLP'
WHEN 'THER5004\PRNW' THEN 'ELTL'
WHEN 'AZSEAER0012\PRT1' THEN 'SEDICO'
WHEN 'CNER0343\PXRH' THEN 'CHLOE'
WHEN 'CNT-RXREPP01\PXRT' THEN 'TRISTAR'
WHEN 'INLR0425\PXRG' THEN 'EMIL'
WHEN 'AZFRCER0263\PRNW' THEN 'LABEX'
END AS 'LAB',*,Getdate() as 'RefDate'
FROM 
(
SELECT
    UPPER(
        CASE
            WHEN LEN(ISNULL(CAST(SERVERPROPERTY('InstanceName') AS VARCHAR(20)), '')) = 0
                THEN CAST(SERVERPROPERTY('MachineName') AS VARCHAR(20))
            ELSE CAST(SERVERPROPERTY('MachineName') AS VARCHAR(20))
                 + '\' + CAST(SERVERPROPERTY('InstanceName') AS VARCHAR(20))
        END
    ) AS ServerName,

    CASE publication_type
        WHEN 0 THEN 'Transactional'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Snapshot'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Merge'
    END AS publication_type,

    CASE
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN status IN (5,6) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
            THEN 'Error'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS [status]

FROM distribution.dbo.MSreplication_monitordata  
where publication_type=0
GROUP BY
    publication_type ) A
